info.title: Mannco.store API
info.description: Complete API documentation for Mannco.store - Buy and sell TF2, CS:GO, Dota 2, Rust and Steam community items. All routes use the `api` filter. Endpoints marked Connected + API require an `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` token obtained from POST /user/login. Endpoints marked API only do not require a user session.

tags.name: Items
tags.description: Item details, listings, pricing, and sales graphs

tags.name: Offers
tags.description: Create, manage, and respond to trade offers

tags.name: Buy Orders
tags.description: Create, update, and manage buy orders

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Checkout sessions for balance and cart payments

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Manage user inventory: list, price, and withdraw

tags.name: Listing
tags.description: Deposit Steam items and instant sell

post.description: Authenticates and returns a JWT used as `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` for Connected + API endpoints.

get.description:
Returns full item details from the `items` table. You can pass either a numeric item ID or a URL slug.

**Permission:** API only (no session required).

Returns historical sales data for charting, aggregated from `items_stats`. For periods `5Y` and `ALL`, data is grouped by week instead of by day.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns the number of active listings for an item. The variant `GET /item/listing/count/{item}/{userid}` returns the count for a specific seller only.

**Permission:** API.

Returns paginated listings sorted by price ascending. The variant `GET /item/listing/{item}/{userid}` filters by seller. For non-admin callers, `user` and `ip` are omitted.

**Permission:** API.

Returns active buy orders for an item, grouped by price tier. Up to 5 tiers are returned as keys 0-4; additional tiers are aggregated under `more`.

**Permission:** API.

Returns a list of items for the given game with name, craftable flag, effect, URL slug, in-stock asset count, and lowest sale price.

**Permission:** Connected + API. **Rate limit:** 1 request per 5 minutes per API key.

Returns calculated pricing data including lowest sale, highest buy order, Steam price, suggested listing price, and optional last sale. Cached for 20 minutes.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns pricing data for multiple items at once. Each entry adds `from_cache`. The envelope includes `cached_items` and `refreshed_items` counts. Reuses rows in `prices` when updated within the last 5 minutes.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

get.summary: Get item details from backpack ID (TF2)
get.description:
Returns full backpack + item details for a TF2 item by its asset ID. Joins `backpack`, `items`, and `item_infos`. The `craftable` field is empty for non-TF2 games.

**Permission:** API.

get.summary: Get item details from backpack ID (CS2)
get.description:
Same as the TF2 variant but specifically for CS2 items with wear, sticker, and pattern information.

**Permission:** API.

Returns trade offers received from other users (current user is the seller). Offers are auto-validated; those with status < 0 are filtered out.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns trade offers sent to other users (current user is the buyer). Note: this returns an array directly in `content`, unlike `/offers/received`.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

post.description:
Creates a new trade offer to purchase an item from another user.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

id.description: Steam assetId of the listed item

post.description:
Accepts a received trade offer and completes the transaction (seller action).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Declines a received trade offer (seller action).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Cancels a sent offer (buyer action). Only the offer creator can remove it.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Creates a buy order for a specific item at a specified price. Only one buy order per item per user. The total (value x amount) is reserved from your balance.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

amount.description: Number of items to buy (max 499999 per create)

post.description:
Replaces your existing buy order for the same item with a new price and/or quantity. You must already have a buy order on the item.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

itemid.description: Item ID of the buy order to update

post.description:
Cancels and removes your buy order for an item, releasing the reserved balance.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

itemid.description: Item ID of the buy order to remove

get.summary: Get user's buy orders for an item
get.description:
Returns all active buy orders for a specific item created by the authenticated user.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns active buy orders for the authenticated user across all items. Ordered by `buyorder.id DESC`; only returns buy orders where `amount != 0`.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

parameters.name: undercut
parameters.description: Filter to buy orders below the current lowest sale price

post.description:
Initiates a payment. The server validates the body with the provider, records the transaction, and returns a redirect URL or a success message. Use `type: balance` to add credit or `type: items` to pay for listed items. The `mannco` provider only supports `type: items`.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: payviox (card / external checkout) or mannco (on-site balance)

type.description: balance (add credit) or items (pay for listed items)

tos_timestamp.description: Client timestamp of Terms of Service acceptance

value.description: For type=balance: amount in cents to add

items.description: For type=items: comma-separated Steam assetId values

get.description:
Returns all items currently listed for sale by the authenticated user (state = 1).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns all items in the authenticated user's inventory (not listed for sale, state = 0).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

post.description:
Sets a price for items and matches them with existing buy orders. If a buy order exists at or above your price, the item is instantly sold (seller receives 95%, 5% platform fee); otherwise it is listed.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Initiates a trade offer to withdraw items from the user's Mannco.store inventory to their Steam account. Items must be state 0 or 1 to be withdrawable.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's cart with full item details for each row. Each row can group one or more asset IDs for the same item at the same price.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

post.description:
Adds a single item to the cart by its asset ID. The item must be for sale (state = 1) and not owned by you. The price is stored at add time.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

assetId.description: Steam asset ID of the item to add

post.description:
Adds multiple items of the same type in one call, selecting the cheapest available listings (excluding items already in your cart). Items are grouped by price.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

sellerUserId.description: Optional: only consider listings from this seller

post.description:
Removes one cart row (and all its asset IDs) from the cart.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

cartId.description: Cart row ID (from get cart response)

post.description:
Runs cart integrity checks and optionally fixes the cart: verifies each item still exists, is for sale, and has the same price; replaces invalid plain items with equivalent listings at the same price; deletes empty rows. Use before checkout.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

get.description:
Returns your Steam inventory for that game with `depositkey` maps per asset id, pricing hints, and optional high-stock fields. Each depositkey is validated server-side when submitting POST /deposit/trade.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

post.description:
Submits deposit prices and keys to create a trade. Use `content.id` as the tradeid for GET /deposit/tradeStatus/{tradeid}.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

prices.description: Map assetId string to price in cents

depositKeys.description: Map assetId to the depositkey from GET /deposit/{game}

get.description:
Returns enriched inventory data for instant-sell pricing, built from cached deposit lists and buy-order tiers.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

post.description:
Same general idea as POST /deposit/trade, plus a cashout method. Supported games: 753, 440, 252490. Requires prices and depositKeys as objects.

**Permission:** Connected + API (2FA satisfied automatically with API JWT).

get.description:
Returns the deposit row plus nested `trade` when available. Trade status: 0 = Pending, 3 = Completed, -1 = Failed.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns pending trades for the authenticated user (deposits not completed, withdrawals not finished).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns up to the last 500 trades for the authenticated user, ordered by time descending. No query parameters.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Retries sending a trade that meets server conditions. The query parameter name is `id`, not `resend`.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Internal trade id from GET /trades/active or GET /trades/all

get.description:
Invalidates the current session / token.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns account fields such as steamId, balance (cents), tradeurl, name, image, 2fa, shorturl, and notification.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns the current account balance in cents.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns aggregated unread data (alerts, payment reviews, messages, offers, trades).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns session rows (ip, location, isp, current, timestamps) and a total count.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns minimal public info (steamId, image, name) for a store, or an error if not found.

**Permission:** API route filter only (no Bearer required).

Summary sales metrics for the authenticated user.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Chart-oriented sales data.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Paginated balance changes. First page (page = 0) returns values and count; later pages may return only values.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Paginated purchase records.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Paginated sales records. An admin variant GET /user/getSalesHistory/{userid} (Connected + admin) returns another user's history.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Paginated cashout records. Supports page and one of count, perpage, or limit for page size (max 50).

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Paginated transaction records.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

Returns the detail payload for a transaction, or an error if not found / access denied.

**Permission:** Connected + API.

ApiError.description: Standard Mannco.store response envelope. `err` and `success` flag the outcome; the payload (or error message) is always under `content`.

content.description: Payload on success, or an error message/object on failure.

Offer.description: A trade offer between two users.

status.description: Offer status code (see Offer status codes).

CartItem.description: A cart row grouping one or more asset IDs of the same item at the same price.

Trade.description: A Steam trade processed by the platform.

DepositRow.description: A depositable inventory entry with its server-issued deposit key(s).

depositkey.description: Map of asset ID to its deposit key.

BusinessError.description: Business error. The request was understood but rejected by domain rules (HTTP 300).

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. Missing/invalid JWT, blocked country, or insufficient permissions.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix time when the window resets.

example.content: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after 60 seconds.

ItemPathParam.name: item
ItemPathParam.description: Item identifier (numeric ID or URL slug).

PageParam.name: page
PageParam.description: Zero-based page number (offset = page x page size).
